spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the four physical corner-shape longhands, four-value shorthand support, and rejected malformed longhand/function values.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now includes contract cards plus an invalid top-left button that drives corner-top-left-shape into an unknown value and reports the browser rejecting it.

references.rationale: The see-also section now cites https://chromestatus.com/feature/5357329815699456 and the CSS Borders 4 corner-shaping spec.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Repaired with Chrome 148 / chrome-devtools-mcp verification. The select controls, radius slider, preset buttons, generated CSS, and copy button remain interactive; labels are associated with controls; the invalid longhand path reports CSSOM rejection; and the required ChromeStatus/spec references are present.
